# Gianluca Orpello

> Senior iOS Engineer and Apple Certified Trainer based in Naples, Italy.

Gianluca Orpello is a Senior iOS Engineer, Apple Certified Trainer, and startup co-founder with six years of experience building Swift and SwiftUI applications across the Apple platform. He co-founded Tilted Penguins, where he built morganize.it from first commit to acquisition. He is currently Co-Founder and Tech Lead at Unicorn Donkeys, building Defenso.it — a LegalTech platform for workflow automation.

## Core expertise

- Swift and SwiftUI (8+ years, production)
- The Composable Architecture (TCA), MVVM, Swift Concurrency
- Full Apple ecosystem: iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, tvOS, visionOS
- Backend: Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Docker, GitHub Actions
- Apple Certified Trainer (LearnQuest / Apple): Swift, SwiftUI, iOS SDK
- Startup building: co-founder, team leadership, exit

## Pages

- [Portfolio](https://gianlucaorpello.com/): Full career history, skills, certifications, and contact
- [Blog](https://gianlucaorpello.com/blog/): Technical writing on Swift, SwiftUI, TCA, startups
- [SwiftUI + TCA: Lessons from Production](https://gianlucaorpello.com/blog/tca-architecture.html): In-depth article on building with The Composable Architecture
